headline: Assessing Visa (V) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Event context and recent price moves Visa (V) shares have been under pressure recently, with the stock showing negative returns over the past week, month, past 3 months and year. This has naturally led investors to reassess what they are paying for the business. See our latest analysis for Visa. With the share price at US$315.97 after a 1-day share price return of a 0.44% decline and a year-to-date share price return of an 8.81% decline, Visa’s shorter-term momentum looks weaker, even though...

headline: Forget Cap-Weighted Indexes: Why This Equal Weight Large-Cap ETF Belongs in Every Retirement Portfolio Instead
summary: Cap-weighted index funds have a structural quirk that most investors overlook: the more a stock’s price rises, the more of your money gets automatically funneled into it. With NVIDIA, Apple, and Microsoft now representing roughly 28% of the iShares S&P 100 ETF (OEF), owning a cap-weighted large-cap fund today means roughly one dollar in three ... Forget Cap-Weighted Indexes: Why This Equal Weight Large-Cap ETF Belongs in Every Retirement Portfolio Instead

headline: Elon Musk says X Money to enter early public access next month
summary: Elon Musk on Tuesday said X Money, ‌the social media platform's digital ‌payment system, will enter early public access ​next month, as the billionaire pushes to transform X into an "everything app."  X partnered with payment company Visa last year to help offer direct payment services to customers of the social media app.

headline: Visa’s Stablecoin Push Tests Future Of Global Card And Fee Flows
summary: Visa is expanding stablecoin backed card programs globally, now covering more than 100 countries in partnership with Stripe and Bridge. The company is piloting on chain settlement for some transactions, using blockchain rails alongside traditional payment infrastructure. Visa is broadening its cross border reach through acquisitions such as Prisma Medios de Pago and integrations with UnionPay. New collaborations with AWS aim to support agentic commerce tools and next generation digital...
